hooks.statusMessage: Checking for data files in git add...
hooks.command: node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');const c=JSON.parse(d).tool_input?.command||'';if(!c.match(/git\s+add/)){process.exit(0);}if(c.match(/\.(xlsx|csv|db)\b/) || c.match(/\/data\//)){console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:'Client data files must never be committed. They are gitignored for a reason.'}));}process.exit(0);"

node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');const c=JSON.parse(d).tool_input?.command||'';if(c.match(/git\s+push/) && c.match(/(--force|-f\b)/)){console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:'Force push is not allowed. node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');const c=JSON.parse(d).tool_input?.command||'';if(!c.match(/git\s+push/)){process.exit(0);}const {execSync}=require('child_process');const base='C:/Users/marco/Documents/recon-app-template/app';try{const out=execSync('grep -rl "console\.log\|debugger" app components lib --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"',{cwd:base,encoding:'utf8'});if(out.trim()){console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'WARNING: console.log/debugger found before push in:
'+out.trim().split('
').slice(0,5).join('
')}));}}catch(e){}process.exit(0);"

node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');const p=JSON.parse(d).tool_input?.file_path||'';if(!p.match(/\.(ts|tsx)$/) || p.match(/lib\/format\.ts$/)){process.exit(0);}const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync(p))process.exit(0);const src=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');const hits=src.split('\n').map((l,i)=>({l,i})).filter(({l})=>l.includes('.toFixed('));if(hits.length>0){console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'WARNING: .toFixed() found in '+p.split('/').pop()+' (lines '+hits.map(({i})=>i+1).join(',')+') — use formatMoney() for money values.'}));}process.exit(0);"

node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');const obj=JSON.parse(d);const p=obj.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(!p.match(/supabase.migrations.*\.sql$/)){process.exit(0);}const content=obj.tool_input?.content||'';if(!content.includes('-- DOWN')){console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'WARNING: Migration is missing a -- DOWN rollback section. Add a -- DOWN comment block showing the inverse operations before committing.'}));}process.exit(0);"
